metadata.source: Cross-referenced from 6 sources: jlptglobal.com, Kanshudo, Nihongo-Pro, JLPT Bootcamp, Kanji Master Suki, Fluentin3months
metadata.catatan: Standard version of 103 N5 kanji. Removed 16 non-N5 kanji (草林森石犬鳥虫海田帰文字力赤青黒). Added 8 missing N5 kanji (駅道店社午何出入).

contoh_kalimat.arti: to rest, to take a day off
to be empty, to be vacant
